---
title: "Parameterized Synthetic Biomarker Summary"
author: "Your name"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
params:
  chemical: "PFOA"
  site: "Research Triangle Park"
  threshold: 4.0
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

biomarker_data <- read.csv("data/workshop_biomarkers.csv")
chemical_columns <- c(PFOA = "pfoa_serum", PFOS = "pfos_serum")
valid_sites <- c("All", sort(unique(biomarker_data$site)))

if (!params$chemical %in% names(chemical_columns)) {
  stop("chemical must be PFOA or PFOS")
}
if (!params$site %in% valid_sites) {
  stop("site must be All or one of: ", paste(valid_sites[-1], collapse = ", "))
}
if (!is.numeric(params$threshold) || length(params$threshold) != 1 ||
    is.na(params$threshold) || params$threshold <= 0) {
  stop("threshold must be one positive number")
}

selected <- biomarker_data |>
  filter(params$site == "All" | site == params$site) |>
  transmute(
    site,
    concentration = .data[[chemical_columns[[params$chemical]]]]
  )

n_above <- sum(selected$concentration > params$threshold)
pct_above <- 100 * n_above / nrow(selected)
```

## Current parameter set

This report summarizes **`r params$chemical`** at **`r params$site`**. Of `r nrow(selected)` synthetic records, `r n_above` (`r round(pct_above, 1)`%) exceed the arbitrary teaching threshold of `r params$threshold` ng/mL.

::: {.callout-warning}
The data and threshold are synthetic teaching inputs. They are not regulatory, clinical, or health-based values.
:::

```{r}
#| label: fig-parameter-distribution
#| fig-cap: !expr paste("Distribution of simulated serum", params$chemical, "at", params$site)
#| fig-alt: !expr paste("Histogram of simulated serum", params$chemical, "at", params$site, "with a dashed teaching threshold at", params$threshold, "nanograms per milliliter.")
#| echo: false

ggplot(selected, aes(concentration)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 25, boundary = 0) +
  geom_vline(
    xintercept = params$threshold,
    linewidth = 0.9,
    linetype = "dashed"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = paste("Serum", params$chemical, "(ng/mL)"),
    y = "Synthetic record count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
